basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
basic_details.post_name: Public Relations Media Administration & Industry Connect Executive
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) has released the official Executive Notification 2026 at the official website. Has been announced under the RGIPT Executive Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing or related field along with 2-5 years of relevant experience can apply through Email on or before 07 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing
qualification.details: Executive : Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Journalism / Marketing or related field. Minimum 2-5 years of relevant experience in PR, media relations, administration, industry liaison, or in the relevant field. Experience in educational institutions, government or the corporate sector is preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RGIPT Executive Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGIPT Public Relations, Media, Administration & Industry Connect Executive post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the RGIPT Public Relations, Media, Administration & Industry Connect Executive post is 07 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Management, Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Marketing, or a related field.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 to 5 years of relevant experience is required for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Public Relations, Media, Administration & Industry Connect Executive role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the official email address provided by RGIPT.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any specific preference for experience?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in educational institutions, government, or the corporate sector is preferred.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the RGIPT Bengaluru Campus located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the RGIPT Bengaluru Campus, located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
